name: SC-02: Customer Journey Funnel Analytics Agent

message.content: You are a growth analyst specializing in funnel optimization. Analyze funnel performance, identify biggest drop-off stage, calculate channel ROAS, recommend top 3 optimization actions with expected impact. Focus on actionable insights. Quantify recommendations.

parameters.text:
=📈 FUNNEL ANALYTICS REPORT

Period: {{ $json.date_range }}
Overall Conversion: {{ $json.overall_conversion_rate }}%

Funnel:
• Awareness: {{ $json.funnel.awareness.sessions }} sessions
• Interest: {{ $json.funnel.interest.page_views }} views ({{ $json.funnel.interest.conversion_rate }}%)
• Consideration: {{ $json.funnel.consideration.add_to_carts }} ATC ({{ $json.funnel.consideration.conversion_rate }}%)
• Conversion: {{ $json.funnel.conversion.checkouts }} checkouts ({{ $json.funnel.conversion.conversion_rate }}%)
• Purchase: {{ $json.funnel.purchase.orders }} orders ({{ $json.funnel.purchase.conversion_rate }}%)

{{ $json.dropoff_points.length > 0 ? '⚠️ Drop-off Points:\n' + $json.dropoff_points.map(d => '• ' + d.stage + ': ' + d.rate).join('\n') : '✅ No major drop-offs' }}

💡 Analysis:
{{ $json.analysis.substring(0, 500) }}...
